steps.t: The Dourhands control the port-city of Kheledûl, where Avorthal will soon be taken aboard a ship destined northward. This Dourhand stronghold is also …
You have collected the treasure-boxes and eliminated many of Kheledûl's Dourhand occupants. Now you must get to the Irestone, the ship preparing to ta…
Avorthal is on the deck of the Irestone, still docked at Kheledûl. You should free Avorthal.
